mapper.select: select cs.id, cs.spec_name, cs.merchant_id, cs.group_id, cs.create_time, cs.state, csg.group_name, cmi.merchant_name from cm_product_spec cps left join cm_specification cs on cps.spec_id = cs.id left join cm_specification_group csg on cs.group_id = csg.id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cs.merchant_id = cmi.id where cs.state = '1' and cs.deleted = '0' and cps.product_id = #{productId}
